title: engine: orchestrator claims EVERY queue .json — must skip external-research + deferred tickets
source: engine/store/queue/.CONVENTION.md warning + auto-wake prerequisite (M1 hardening run)
prompt: pending_tickets() in engine/orchestrator.py returns every .json in queue/. Per .CONVENTION.md this wrongly dispatches kind=external-research tickets (payloads for a non-Claude consumer) and David-deferred tickets to tmux workers. Add a dispatchable() filter: skip tickets with kind=external-research, executor=external-research-agent, or status/priority=deferred; skip-and-warn on unparseable JSON. Log skipped tickets once per pass (not spam).
verify: Drop a fake external-research ticket + a fake deferred ticket + a normal ticket into a temp queue scan; pending_tickets() returns only the normal one. Real queue: the deferred project-digest ticket is excluded.

verify_transcript: temp queue (normal + external-research + status:deferred + priority:deferred + broken JSON) -> pending_tickets() == ['20260101T-normal.json']
each skip logged exactly once ([skip] lines), second pass silent
result.notes: dispatchable() filter + log-once set; external-research/deferred tickets stay in queue/ untouched. Executed directly by orchestrator (surgical prerequisite for CAP + auto-wake builders).
result.orchestrator_review: 2026-07-06T08:23Z live run: orchestrator --pool 5 --max-wall 20 --teardown -> [cap] clamp 5->3 warning printed; 3 warm workers booted 10s; [backoff] skip logged with live flag; [skip] deferred ticket excluded; exit 0; pool torn down (tmux clean); BACKOFF untouched by run, cleared after. wake watcher: launchd loaded, DISARMED, debounce quiet-lines in wake.log, deferred ticket skipped.
